converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Gerald Combs papers
Combs, Gerald F.
29-2-3335
1.4 cubic feet. 1.4 cubic feet.
1955-2001. Correspondence, articles, lectures, grant material and committee work. Correspondence, articles, lectures, grant material and committee work, pertaining to Combs'career and his work with poultry nutrition, selenium and cancer. Collection material in English 5076590
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Eileen Keating
Date completed:
May 2004
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, June 2004
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor in Nutritional Sciences and Animal Sciences, Cornell University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, articles, lectures, grant material and committee work, pertaining to Combs'career and his work with poultry nutrition, selenium and cancer.
Cite As:
Gerald Combs papers, #29-2-3335. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Related Materials
See also collections #47-10-3394 and #29-1-3247 for additional biographical information.
Poultry -- Feeding and feeds. Selenium -- Health aspects. Cancer -- Nutritional aspects. Selenium -- Physiological effect. Nutritional science -- Study and teaching. Cornell University -- : Faculty.
